title: Sucat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sucat, with a Z-Score of +3.40. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sucat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.9 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 73%, while the wind speed is moderate at 11.3 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, with no heating degree days recorded, indicating a high level of heat stress.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
